final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,        // Write enable
    input wire [7:0] din, // Data input
    output reg [7:0] dout // Data output
);
    reg [7:0] mem;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin mem <= din ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  dout <= mem ;
  end
endmodule
